name: vike-elements
description: vike-elements: composable UI as data. The framework-agnostic substrate for building a page out of BLOCKS — a block descriptor IR + an open registry, the definePage composer, primitive elements (text/heading/badge/divider/link, stat/markdown/custom), and the defineElement seam so any package can ship a new element with high DX. vike-view layers schema-driven blocks on top.
